prestazioni: M838TE 3.8L twin-turbo V8 engine: Replace stock turbos with Garrett GT35R 84mm billet wheel units (1.25 bar peak boost, 700whp target) paired with a custom McLaren-specific turbo manifold by Armytrix for optimized exhaust pulse separation and reduced lag

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone conversion with bespoke McLaren 570S Track Pack calibration by APR Performance, including anti-lag system (ALS) for track use, optimized fueling for E85 blends (up to 50% ethanol), and individual cylinder knock control with Bosch Motorsport 0261230046 sensors

Ohlins TTX40 MkII 3-way adjustable coilovers with McLaren-specific spring rates (18kg/mm front, 22kg/mm rear) and custom valving by JRZ Suspension Engineering, paired with a full carbon fiber monoball spherical bearing kit from VAC Motorsports to eliminate compliance in the front and rear subframes
estetica: Full carbon fiber aero package by Vorsteiner, including a 570S-specific GT-spec front splitter with integrated dive planes (25mm extension), rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (adjustable via cockpit switch), and a 1,100mm wide rear wing with dual-element design and 3D-printed titanium endplates for reduced weight

Custom 20" front / 21" rear forged aluminum wheels by HRE Performance Wheels (FF03 model, 9.5x20 ET40 front, 11.5x21 ET50 rear) with titanium lug bolts and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35 R20 front, 305/30 R21 rear) for optimized track wear and heat cycling

Full interior carbon fiber weave upgrade by Novitec, including a bespoke 570S Track Pack roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 3.5mm wall thickness) with integrated fire suppression system (Sparco Pro 2000, 4kg Novec 1230 agent) and Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, 6-point Schroth harnesses, 1.2kg weight savings per seat)
